summary: TWO_COLUMN Cauchy integral formula for f(z)=z²-2z+3, contour |z|=2, z_0=1+0.5i. LEFT ComplexPlane with BLUE contour + RED z_0 + YELLOW sampling dots on contour via ValueTracker N_tr (2→100 points). always_redraw dots. RIGHT live numeric integral (1/2πi)∮f/(z-z_0)dz converging to f(z_0)=1.75 with error → 0.
